name: BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Unpatched Server
notes: This building block monitors the MS event 4672 for users not listed as DC Administrators which implies possible TGT  PAC Forgery on an unpatched server.
bb_references: BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Unpatched Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (5000502) Failure Audit: Special privileges assigned to new logon, (5002028) Special privileges assigned to new logon., (5000858) Success Audit: Successful logon with administrative or special privileges
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controller Administrators - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : TGT PAC Forgery Unpatched Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000502) Failure Audit: Special privileges assigned to new logon, (5002028) Special privileges assigned to new logon., (5000858) Success Audit: Successful logon with administrative or special privileges
AND NOT when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controller Administrators - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
